payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark painted wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and mostly matte finish; it fills the vertical crop, shows a slight scuff/reflective area on the left, and the lower-right edge is cut off revealing a sliver of hardware — viewed from about 1.0 m away.
attributes: visible scuff or wear near left edge

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark recessed-panel cabinet door","long_description":"Tall dark painted wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and mostly matte finish; it fills the vertical crop, shows a slight scuff/reflective area on the left, and the lower-right edge is cut off revealing a sliver of hardware — viewed from about 1.0 m away.","attributes":["dark gray/black color","painted wood","recessed rectangular panel","matte finish with slight reflection","vertical orientation","edge-cropped / partial (lower-right)","visible scuff or wear near left edge","single door panel"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
